hero.subtitle: Franco-Thai Restaurant
hero.tagline: A culinary fusion in the heart of Krabi's jungle

about.title: Welcome to our cabana
about.description1: Nestled in the heart of Krabi, our gastronomic Franco-Thai restaurant with an intimate dining room where <chef>Chef Jariya</chef> and her team welcome you with warmth and passion.
about.description2: With only <seats>40 seats maximum</seats>, we prioritize an intimate and personalized experience. For groups of more than 10 people, reservation by phone or direct contact on site is recommended.
about.kitchenClose: The kitchen stops taking orders at 10:00 PM
about.chefQuote: With love and creativity, I blend French and Thai flavors to create unique dishes that tell a story.

cuisine.title: Our Cuisine
cuisine.description: A delicate fusion between French tradition and Thai flavors, prepared with fresh ingredients from the jungle

menuSection.title: Our Menu
menuSection.description: Discover our culinary creations, a unique fusion of French and Thai flavors
menuSection.noItems: No dishes available in this category

reservationForm.title: Reservation
reservationForm.subtitle: Reserve your table for a unique culinary experience in the Krabi jungle
reservationForm.required: * Required fields. Reservation will be confirmed by phone.
reservationForm.largeGroupWarning: ⚠️ For large groups, we will contact you to confirm availability.
reservationForm.successMessage: Thank you for your reservation request. We will contact you shortly to confirm.
reservationForm.successNote: 📞 For groups of more than 10 people, please call us directly.

contactSection.title: Find Us
contactSection.groupInfo: For groups of more than 10 people, please contact us by phone or directly on site.
contactSection.welcomeText: We warmly welcome you to our cabana in the heart of Krabi. A tropical gastronomic experience awaits you!
contactSection.viewMapAriaLabel: View our location on Google Maps (opens in new tab)

footer.subtitle: Gastronomic Franco-Thai Restaurant
footer.location: In the heart of Krabi's jungle
footer.legalNotice: Gecko Cabane is a food service establishment registered in Thailand under the Business Registration Act. The sale and consumption of alcohol are subject to Thai excise law (Excise Act B.E. 2560). Personal data collected through this website is processed in accordance with the Thailand Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA B.E. 2562). In accordance with the Thai Consumer Protection Act (B.E. 2522), all prices include applicable taxes. For any enquiries: contact@gecko-cabane.com.

social.title: They Love Us
social.description: Join our community and discover why our guests keep coming back for more
social.tripAdvisorText: Read reviews from our guests on TripAdvisor and share your experience
social.facebookText: Follow us for the latest news, special events and photos of our creations

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.subtitle: This page doesn't exist or has been moved. Return to the home page to continue your experience.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.subtitle: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again or return to the home page.
